no: SubtleD's Item Tweaks by Subtledoctor. Item rebalancing, QoL tweaks, and specific item fixes. Some components require Item Revisions or Spell Revisions.

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks armor/DEX tweaks are redundant with SubtleD's YARAS which provides its own configurable armor system
conflicts.theirComps: #2100 Allow Thieving in Heavy Armor #2120 Allow Arcane Spellcasting in Heavy Armor #6060 NWN-ish Armor vs Dexterity #6070 Defensive Roll Thieves

conflicts.reason: Both modify the same items. Choose one version
conflicts.myComps: #1010 Backstab Immunity Ring #1020 Missile Deflection Gloves

conflicts.reason: SD IT components modify items that IR main (cn:0) also rewrites. YARAS (cn:100) conflicts with IR armor overhaul. Aesthetic (cn:111/112) and Weapons (cn:120) modify enchantment/damage on items IR also changes. Missile Deflection (cn:1020) and Rod of Absorption (cn:1051/1052) modify specific items. IR main (cn:0) — cn:1060 (Kensai Bracers) and cn:1070 (Thieves Wands). These are narrow standalone tweaks with no overlap to SD IT selected components (cn:111 standardizes enchantment naming, cn:120 weapon balance, cn:1020 gloves, cn:1051 rod). No conflict in current preset.
conflicts.myComps: #100 YARAS #111 #112 Aesthetic #120 Weapons #1020 Missile Deflection #1051 #1052 Rod of Absorption
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Item Revisions main (NOT in preset) #1060 Kensai Bracers #1070 Thieves Wands
conflicts.source: IR cn:0 rewrites item files wholesale; SD IT patches specific items; IR cn:1060/1070 are standalone CLAB/usability tweaks with no shared files, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both modify bard/mage armor casting restrictions
conflicts.theirComps: #2120 Allow Arcane Spellcasting in Heavy Armor

conflicts.reason: Only relevant if AK Red Wizard kit is installed (in ArtisansKitpack_npc, Both modify misc89.itm (Edwin amulet). AK Red Wizard, SD IT cn:1092 safely nerfs amulet without interference.

sum: Optional item tweaks including YARAS armor system, weapon tweaks, and individual item modifications.

co.n: YARAS Yet Another Revised Armor System
co.tp2n: YARAS Yet Another Revised Armor System

co.n: Aesthetic: Standardize Enchanted Equipment
co.tp2n: Standardize Enchanted Equipment
co.no: Standardizes enchanted equipment naming/descriptions. NOT for IWDEE. Pick one aesthetic option.

co.n: Aesthetic: Replace with Mastercraft
co.tp2n: Replace Enchanted Equipment with Mastercraft

co.n: Functional Weapon Tweaks
co.tp2n: Functional Weapon Tweaks

co.n: IWDEE Item Tweaks
co.tp2n: IWD Item Tweaks
co.no: IWDEE ONLY or requires IWD-in-EET. REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~iwdee~ OR MOD_IS_INSTALLED IWD1_EET cn:1.

co.n: All Potions Usable by Any Class
co.tp2n: All Potions Usable by Any Class
co.no: Removes class restrictions from all potions.

co.n: Armored Spellcasting for Bards
co.tp2n: Armored Spellcasting for Bards

co.n: Set Spell Weapon APR to 2
co.tp2n: Set Spell Weapon APR to 2
co.no: Also done by Bardic Wonders and cdtweaks

co.n: Add Backstab Immunity to the Ring of Danger Sense
co.tp2n: Add Backstab Immunity to the Ring of Danger Sense
co.no: Adds backstab immunity to Ring of Danger Sense. Similar to ZSTweaks.

co.n: Proper Missile Deflection for the Gloves of Missile Snaring
co.tp2n: Proper Missile Deflection for the Gloves of Missile Snaring
co.no: Fixes Gloves of Missile Snaring to properly deflect missiles. Similar to ZSTweaks.

co.n: Improve Detonating Weapons
co.tp2n: Improve Detonating Weapons

co.n: Add Revised Barkskin to 'Skin of the Forest' Armor
co.tp2n: Add Revised Barkskin to 'Skin of the Forest' Armor

co.n: Rod of Absorption: Instantaneous Use
co.tp2n: ...Instantaneous Use
co.no: Requires Item Revisions cn:0. Makes Rod of Absorption instantaneous. Will fail if IR main not installed.

co.n: Rod of Absorption: Longer Protection
co.tp2n: ...Longer Protection
co.no: Requires Item Revisions cn:0. Extends Rod of Absorption protection duration.

co.n: Permanent Fear Protection for the Badge of the Brave
co.tp2n: Permanent Fear Protection for the Badge of the Brave
co.no: Requires Badge of the Brave (amulbra.itm) from SoD content. May not be available if SoD items haven't been imported yet.

co.n: Make the Gargoyle Cloak Apply Stoneskin Instead of an AC Bonus
co.tp2n: Make the Gargoyle Cloak Apply Stoneskin Instead of an AC Bonus

co.n: Ring of Air Control Tweaks
co.tp2n: Let the Ring or Air Control Cast Gust of Wind
co.no: Requires ring28.itm and Item Revisions cn:0. Will fail if IR main not installed.

co.n: Make the Dwarven Thrower Hammer Usable by Non-Dwarves
co.tp2n: Make the Dwarven Thrower Hammer Usable by Non-Dwarves

co.n: Martial Staff Tweaks
co.tp2n: Make the Martial Staff Grant +APR
co.no: Requires staf08.itm. Modifies Staff of Striking.

co.n: Improve Azlaer's Harp and Methild's Harp
co.tp2n: Improve Azlaer's Harp and Methild's Harp
co.no: Doesn't cover Thrown Hammers' IWD copy

co.n: Edwin Amulet: Only +1 bonus per level
co.tp2n: Only +1 Bonus Slot per Spell Level
co.no: Overlaps with AK red wizard kit but can coexist

co.n: Edwin Amulet: Limited to 7th level
co.tp2n: Limit Bonus Slots to 7th Level Spells

co.n: Edwin Amulet: +1 bonus AND limited to 7th
co.tp2n: Only +1 Bonus Slots AND Limited to 7th Level

co.n: Metamagic Instead of MR for Cloak of the Weave
co.tp2n: Metamagic Instead of MR for Cloak of the Weave
co.no: Requires Item Revisions cn:0. Replaces magic resistance with metamagic on Cloak of the Weave. Will fail if IR main not installed.

co.n: Free 1st-level Spellcasting for Some Items
co.tp2n: Free 1st-level Spellcasting for Some Items
co.no: Requires d5zclons.2da (from SubtleD Spell Tweaks). Grants free 1st-level casting to select items.

co.n: Rings of Wizardry: Replace Evermemory with Ring of Acuity
co.tp2n: Replace Evermemory with a Ring of Acuity

co.n: Rings of Wizardry: Replace Ring of Acuity with Evermemory
co.tp2n: Replace the Ring of Acuity with Evermemory
